_notes: Owned by the leg-pipeline-designer agent. Other agents read this; only leg-pipeline-designer writes it. Each top-level key under 'legs' is a leg ID in the form <style>_<material>. The 'renders' sub-object maps angle slugs to PNG paths relative to the repo root. The 'explicit_descriptor' field is used verbatim in sofa generation prompts alongside the reference image — it is the dual text+image signal that mitigates leg-geometry-morphing.
_schema_compatibility: prompts/schemas/sofa.json v0.2.0 — variant.legs.reference resolves to a key in this manifest; variant.legs.explicit_descriptor should be populated from the explicit_descriptor field here

tapered_walnut.explicit_descriptor: four tapered cylindrical legs, no braces, no brackets, no stretchers, solid walnut with a satin finish, grain running vertically, legs taper from approximately 4 cm diameter at the top to 2 cm at the base, dark chocolate brown
tapered_walnut.source: procedural — generate via Blender geometry nodes or lathe modifier from a profile curve

tapered_oak.explicit_descriptor: four tapered cylindrical legs, no braces, no brackets, no stretchers, solid oak with a natural matte finish, warm honey-blonde grain running vertically, legs taper from approximately 4 cm diameter at the top to 2 cm at the base
tapered_oak.source: procedural — same profile curve as tapered_walnut, oak material applied

tapered_mattewhite.explicit_descriptor: four tapered cylindrical legs, no braces, no brackets, matte white painted finish, uniform opaque white surface with no visible grain, legs taper from approximately 4 cm diameter at the top to 2 cm at the base
tapered_mattewhite.source: procedural — same profile curve as tapered_walnut, mattewhite material applied

hairpin_blacksteel.explicit_descriptor: three-rod hairpin legs, black powder-coated steel, three parallel 8 mm diameter steel rods bent into a hairpin shape meeting at a flat steel mounting plate, no cross braces, open airy silhouette, matte black finish
hairpin_blacksteel.source: procedural — Blender curve modifier on circular profile, bent into hairpin shape

hairpin_brass.explicit_descriptor: three-rod hairpin legs, brushed brass finish, three parallel 8 mm diameter brass rods bent into a hairpin shape meeting at a flat brass mounting plate, no cross braces, warm gold-toned brushed metal surface with directional grain
hairpin_brass.source: procedural — same geometry as hairpin_blacksteel, brass material applied

hairpin_chrome.explicit_descriptor: three-rod hairpin legs, polished chrome finish, three parallel 8 mm diameter steel rods bent into a hairpin shape meeting at a flat chrome mounting plate, no cross braces, highly reflective mirror-like silver surface
hairpin_chrome.source: procedural — same geometry as hairpin_blacksteel, chrome material applied

plinth_oak.explicit_descriptor: solid oak plinth base, a continuous recessed skirting running around the full perimeter of the sofa base, approximately 8 cm tall, flat rectangular form with a thin reveal gap between the sofa frame and the floor, no individual legs, natural oak finish

geometry.attachment: glued and screwed to sofa base

plinth_oak.source: procedural — box mesh with bevel on lower edge

plinth_mattewhite.material: matte white painted MDF or wood
plinth_mattewhite.explicit_descriptor: matte white plinth base, a continuous recessed skirting running around the full perimeter of the sofa base, approximately 8 cm tall, flat rectangular form with a thin reveal gap between the sofa frame and the floor, no individual legs, uniform matte white finish

geometry.attachment: glued and screwed to sofa base

plinth_mattewhite.source: procedural — same geometry as plinth_oak, mattewhite material applied

bun_walnut.explicit_descriptor: four bun feet, solid walnut, spherical-flattened form approximately 10 cm tall and 9 cm wide at mid-height, smooth turned surface with no decorative rings, dark chocolate brown walnut grain, one bun at each corner
bun_walnut.source: procedural — Blender lathe/spin modifier on a bun profile curve

bun_oak.explicit_descriptor: four bun feet, solid oak, spherical-flattened form approximately 10 cm tall and 9 cm wide at mid-height, smooth turned surface with no decorative rings, warm honey-blonde oak grain, one bun at each corner
bun_oak.source: procedural — same geometry as bun_walnut, oak material applied

block_oak.explicit_descriptor: four solid rectangular block legs, solid oak, each leg is a square-section column approximately 6 cm wide and 6 cm deep and 12 cm tall, flat top, flat bottom, no taper, no braces, no brackets, natural oak finish with horizontal end grain visible on the bottom face
block_oak.source: procedural — cube mesh scaled to spec

block_walnut.explicit_descriptor: four solid rectangular block legs, solid walnut, each leg is a square-section column approximately 6 cm wide and 6 cm deep and 12 cm tall, flat top, flat bottom, no taper, no braces, no brackets, dark chocolate brown walnut with satin finish
block_walnut.source: procedural — same geometry as block_oak, walnut material applied

splayedtaper_walnut.explicit_descriptor: four splayed tapered legs, solid walnut satin finish, each leg angles outward from the sofa body at approximately 10 degrees, tapered from 4 cm at the top to 2 cm at the base, no braces or brackets, mid-century modern silhouette, dark chocolate brown
splayedtaper_walnut._note_asymmetry: Splay is more visible from front34l and front34r than from front0. Include both 34 angles in any prompt using this leg.
splayedtaper_walnut.source: procedural — tapered cylinder with object rotation applied before rendering

splayedtaper_oak.explicit_descriptor: four splayed tapered legs, solid oak natural finish, each leg angles outward from the sofa body at approximately 10 degrees, tapered from 4 cm at the top to 2 cm at the base, no braces or brackets, mid-century modern silhouette, warm honey-blonde
splayedtaper_oak._note_asymmetry: Splay is more visible from front34l and front34r than from front0.
splayedtaper_oak.source: procedural — same geometry as splayedtaper_walnut, oak material applied

turned_walnut.explicit_descriptor: four turned wooden legs, solid walnut satin finish, classically turned on a lathe with a series of decorative rings and coves along the length, widest at the uppermost ring cuff approximately 5 cm, narrowing at the waist to 2.5 cm, slight splay outward, dark chocolate brown
turned_walnut.source: procedural — Blender lathe/spin modifier on a turned-leg profile curve with decorative rings

turned_oak.explicit_descriptor: four turned wooden legs, solid oak natural finish, classically turned on a lathe with a series of decorative rings and coves along the length, widest at the uppermost ring cuff approximately 5 cm, narrowing at the waist to 2.5 cm, slight splay outward, warm honey-blonde
turned_oak.source: procedural — same geometry as turned_walnut, oak material applied

cabriole_walnut.explicit_descriptor: four cabriole legs, solid walnut satin finish, the characteristic S-curve profile with a pronounced knee at the top curving outward then sweeping inward to a slender ankle and ending in a small pad foot, no braces, no brackets, dark chocolate brown, elegant curved silhouette

geometry.attachment: integral — carved from same piece as frame corner block

cabriole_walnut._note_asymmetry: Cabriole legs are directional. Front legs face forward-out; rear legs face rear-out. The front34l and front34r angles best show the characteristic S-curve. Include both in generation prompts.
cabriole_walnut.source: procedural — Blender curve object defining S-profile, extruded and tapered

squaretaper_blacksteel.explicit_descriptor: four square-section tapered steel legs, black powder-coated finish, each leg has a square cross-section that tapers from approximately 3 cm at the top to 1.5 cm at the base, no braces, no brackets, sharp-edged rectangular profile, matte black

geometry.attachment: welded top plate with 4 bolt holes

squaretaper_blacksteel.source: procedural — cube mesh with vertex-level taper via proportional edit or shear modifier

squaretaper_brass.explicit_descriptor: four square-section tapered legs, brushed brass finish, each leg has a square cross-section that tapers from approximately 3 cm at the top to 1.5 cm at the base, no braces, no brackets, sharp-edged rectangular profile, warm gold-toned directional brushed surface

geometry.attachment: welded top plate with 4 bolt holes

squaretaper_brass.source: procedural — same geometry as squaretaper_blacksteel, brass material applied
